svg.title: Cube Pets Office Architecture
svg.desc: Product architecture overview for Cube Pets Office updated on 2026-04-21. It shows the primary entry surfaces, frontend mission-first office cockpit, server-side cube brain, intelligence and trust layers, executor modes, interop, workflow pipeline, and the separation between browser preview runtime and advanced local runtime.
svg.text: Frontend - office shell + mission-first cockpit + single primary launch dock + overlays
Score below threshold - revise and re-execute
Numbered flows: ①-⑮ show the data path from user query to execution result
2026-04-21 snapshot - 77 tracked specs - bottom launch dock restored - right Launch downgraded to guidance - wall HUD visibility fixed
